Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Tyrfang]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — Tyrfang is an executioner's blade that predates the Empire.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Tyrfang is a black sword that radiates hostile Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Tyrfang is a sword made of rough black metal with veins of bright red.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The bearer of Tyrfang has given Calder a tour.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Tyrfang is a weapon with an aura that can strike humans dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Tyrfang is also referred to as the Executioner’s Blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang is a weapon held by Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang is a blade that can release dark power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang's power has corrosive Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Tyrfang is associated with the Intent used by Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Tyrfang is a weapon that Jorin Maze-walker likely Awakened.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang is an executioner's blade with lethal Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang is a sword that Teach picked up and which became her Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — Tyrfang is a black-and-red blade that emanates dread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Tyrfang is an object carried by a bearer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — Tyrfang releases a red-tinted shadow when used.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Tyrfang is a legendary weapon with a black blade and a red light channel.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Tyrfang is General Teach's legendary sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Tyrfang is a legendary sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Tyrfang is a sheathed weapon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Tyrfang is carried by Kern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Tyrfang's blade is rotten and corrupting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Tyrfang holds enough power to blight forests with every cut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Tyrfang has intrusive Intent.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Tyrfang blazes with black power streaked with blood and brings a sense of corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Tyrfang has a dark Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Tyrfang is a weapon with noxious Intent that can corrupt stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Tyrfang granted power to the Heart of Nakothi.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
